entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/dcaegen2-collectors-restconf-master-verify-java/86/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/dcaegen2-collectors-restconf-master-verify-java/86

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

I have some questions on this one.

The referenced Issue-ID talks about moving various versions forward. These are totally unrelated to the change incorporated here, regrading moving from 2.9.2 to 2.8.0 for

<groupId>io.springfox</groupId><artifactId>springfox-swagger2</artifactId>
and
<groupId>io.springfox</groupId><artifactId>springfox-swagger-ui</artifactId>


Please explain WHY you need to revert the version.

Is it something that was accidentally advanced when a change was made for DCSEGEN2-1824? If so, then say so.

Also be sure to indicate why you cannot just stay at 2.9.2. You will lose the 100 issues that were fixed in 2.9.2 compared with 2.8.0.
(See <https://github.com/springfox/springfox/blob/master/docs/release-notes.md>.)

Abandoned

Found the problem with CSIT failure. the security lib is having problem.
